request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While we debate civil defense budgets, foreign adversaries are exploiting our divisions. Last year, a single cyberattack on our power grid could have left millions without electricity for weeks. Yet some politicians prioritize partisan fights over preparing our communities. We can't afford complacency. Our families deserve better protection. #NationalSecurityFirst #CivilDefenseNow
